result.summary: Found a few layout issues: the right side of the page is clipped in multiple places, and the fixed bottom navigation is overlapping content near the bottom of the screen.

issues.description: The horizontal category row is cut off on the right, with the "Hot Games" tab partially خارج the viewport.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the container width/padding or allow horizontal scrolling so all category tabs are fully reachable and visible.

issues.description: Game tiles in the rightmost column are partially cropped in both sections, indicating the page content is overflowing horizontally.
issues.suggestion: Fix the responsive grid so cards fit within the viewport, or add proper side padding and overflow handling.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the lower game cards, hiding part of the content.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the content area so it clears the fixed nav, or reduce the nav height.
